name: Battlestream Dev Container
postCreateCommand: go install google.golang.org/protobuf/cmd/protoc-gen-go@latest && go install google.golang.org/grpc/cmd/protoc-gen-go-grpc@latest && go install github.com/grpc-ecosystem/grpc-gateway/v2/protoc-gen-grpc-gateway@latest && go install github.com/grpc-ecosystem/grpc-gateway/v2/protoc-gen-openapiv2@latest && go install github.com/golangci/golangci-lint/cmd/golangci-lint@latest && go mod download && ARCH=$(uname -m) && case "$ARCH" in x86_64|amd64) PLATFORM="linux-x64" ;; arm64|aarch64) PLATFORM="linux-arm64" ;; esac && GCS_BUCKET='https://storage.googleapis.com/claude-code-dist-86c565f3-f756-42ad-8dfa-d59b1c096819/claude-code-releases' && VERSION=$(curl -fsSL $GCS_BUCKET/latest) && curl -fsSL -o /tmp/claude $GCS_BUCKET/$VERSION/$PLATFORM/claude && chmod +x /tmp/claude && mkdir -p ~/.local/bin && mv /tmp/claude ~/.local/bin/claude && echo 'export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH"' >> ~/.bashrc && echo 'export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH"' >> ~/.zshrc
